summary: Iteration 35 - IPL Real Data & Head-to-Head Feature Testing Complete. All REAL verified stats from iplt20.com/ESPNcricinfo confirmed: Kohli 8661 runs, Chahal 221 wickets, Dhoni 278 matches, Highest Team Total 287/3 SRH vs RCB 2024, Most Expensive Rs 27 Cr Rishabh Pant, 2025 Cap Winners Sai Sudharsan (Orange) & Prasidh Krishna (Purple). Head-to-Head comparison feature working with animated bars and verdict.

issues: Minor: Console warning about button nested inside button - not affecting functionality

critical_code_review_comments: ipl_data_seeder.py: Excellent rewrite with REAL verified stats from official sources - 20 players, 18 records, 10 cap winners
HeadToHead.jsx: Clean implementation with animated progress bars, verdict calculation, and player selectors with search filter
Minor HTML nesting issue: button inside button in HeadToHead.jsx line 62 (X button inside selector button) - cosmetic only
seed_data_creation: IPL data force-reseeded: 20 players, 18 records, 10 cap winners (2016-2025) with REAL verified stats
context_for_next_testing_agent: All IPL real data features verified: 1) /api/ipl/seed?force=true reseeds all data correctly, 2) /api/ipl/players returns 20 players with REAL stats (Kohli 8661 runs, Chahal 221 wickets, Dhoni 278 matches), 3) /api/ipl/records returns 18 records with correct values (Highest Team Total 287/3 SRH vs RCB 2024, Most Expensive Rs 27 Cr Rishabh Pant), 4) /api/ipl/caps returns 10 cap winners including 2025 (Sai Sudharsan Orange, Prasidh Krishna Purple), 5) /api/ipl/head-to-head returns both players' complete stats for comparison, 6) Frontend Head-to-Head section shows animated bars with verdict, 7) RCB team profile shows 1 title (2025), 8) SRH fun facts include 287/3 record

features_verified.highest_team_total_srh_287: Highest Team Total is 287/3 SRH vs RCB 2024 (not RCB vs GL 2016) - VERIFIED
features_verified.most_expensive_pant_27cr: Most Expensive is Rs 27 Cr Rishabh Pant (not Shreyas Iyer Rs 24.75 Cr) - VERIFIED
features_verified.2025_orange_cap_sai_sudharsan: 2025 Orange Cap: Sai Sudharsan 759 runs GT - VERIFIED
features_verified.2025_purple_cap_prasidh_krishna: 2025 Purple Cap: Prasidh Krishna 25 wickets GT - VERIFIED
features_verified.head_to_head_ui: HeadToHead component with animated bars and verdict - WORKING
features_verified.rcb_1_title_2025: RCB team profile shows 1 title (2025) - VERIFIED
